  "rationale": "Activity M (Tape & finish) is on the critical path. The critical path sequence leading to the end is: ... -> L (Drywall hang) -> M (Tape & finish) -> N (Paint) -> P (Flooring) -> Q (Final inspection). Since there is zero float on this path, any delay to Activity M directly translates to an equal delay to the project completion. Therefore, the project finish is delayed by exactly 3 workdays.",

    "CPM Scheduling Standards"
  ]
